notes: No upstream REST OpenAPI exists. OpenSPP is a social-protection platform built on Odoo; the openspp adaptor uses the odoo-await client to speak Odoo's external API over JSON-RPC (common.authenticate for login, object.execute_kw for search/search_read/create/write). This spec is synthesized from the adaptor surface (ast.json + Adaptor.js source) and projected onto a REST-style resource API so the mocker can seed collections. Covers all 20 public adaptor operations (getGroup, getIndividual, getGroupMembers, getServicePoint, searchGroup, searchIndividual, getProgram, getPrograms, getEnrolledPrograms, enroll, unenroll, createIndividual, createGroup, updateGroup, updateIndividual, addToGroup, removeFromGroup, searchServicePoint, getArea, searchArea) plus a listGroups helper. Resource schemas mirror the underlying Odoo models: Group/Individual -> res.partner, GroupMember -> g2p.group.membership, Program -> g2p.program, ProgramMembership -> g2p.program_membership, ServicePoint -> spp.service.point, Area -> spp.area. Many2one fields are represented as Odoo's [id, name] pairs; field selections match the defaultFields used in the adaptor. Search endpoints take Odoo domain arrays rather than query params.
